'''Besberra''' was an astronomical object<ref name="Codex" /> located in the [[Besberra system/Legends|Besberra system]] in the [[Cegul sector/Legends|Cegul sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas" /> It hosted a [[Besberra arena|gladiatorial arena]] where the [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] [[Torog]] fought to the [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="Codex" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
